title: Nostalgia Features: Beta
description: Removes some unnecessary world features that weren't in Beta.
body:
# THESE MODS ARE NOW UNSUPPORTED, I WILL NOT BE UPDATING THEM ANYMORE

This mod removes the following features:
- Deepslate
- Kelp and seagrass
- Copper ore
- Andesite/Diorite/Granite/Tuff
- Post-beta flowers
- Underwater magma
- Infested stone
- Amethyst Geodes
- Glow lichen
- Bamboo
And, recommends:
- Removal of all structures besides the Stronghold, Nether Fortress and End Cities (optional mod)

## Note
I will not be adding Forge support.
